data.title: [harvest-worktree.sh]: Sourcing hooks lib and setting HOOK_DIR -> uses $SCRIPT_DIR/.. relative paths instead of _PLUGIN_ROOT
data.description:
## Expected Behavior
All plugin scripts must use _PLUGIN_ROOT (resolved via BASH_SOURCE/readlink) for filesystem access — no $SCRIPT_DIR/.. relative paths.

## Actual Behavior
test-plugin-scripts-no-relative-paths.sh reports 3 violations in harvest-worktree.sh:
  Line 149: if [[ -f "$SCRIPT_DIR/../hooks/lib/deps.sh" ]]; then
  Line 150:     source "$SCRIPT_DIR/../hooks/lib/deps.sh"
  Line 158: HOOK_DIR="$SCRIPT_DIR/../hooks"

## Fix
Replace $SCRIPT_DIR/../hooks with $_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks (where _PLUGIN_ROOT is resolved from BASH_SOURCE at script top).
